books.title: While the Billy Boils
books.author: Henry Lawson
books.summary: A short story collection based on Australian colonial life in 1890s.

books.title: Jibby Jones
books.author: Ellis Parker Butler
books.summary: Five boys who live near the Mississippi River embark on an adventure to find hidden pirate treasure.

books.title: You Can’t Win
books.author: Jack Black
books.summary: Jack Black’s autobiographical account of life “on the road” as a professional thief and hobo during the late 19th century and early 20th century.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: The House at Pooh Corner
books.author: A. A. Milne
books.summary: A stuffed bear goes on adventures in the woods with his friends.

books.title: Right Ho, Jeeves
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: Bertie Wooster and his valet Jeeves try their hand at matchmaking in upper-class England.

books.title: The Jew of Malta
books.author: Christopher Marlowe
books.summary: After losing all of his possessions, a Jewish merchant is determined to get his revenge on Malta.

books.title: The Well at the World’s End
books.author: William Morris
books.summary: A king’s son embarks on an adventure to find a legendary well that grants long life.

books.title: The Duel
books.author: Aleksandr Kuprin
books.summary: A Russian officer battles disillusionment and unrequited love.

books.title: The Private Memoirs and Confessions of a Justified Sinner
books.author: James Hogg
books.summary: A religious fanatic’s mysterious friend helps turn him into a killer.

books.title: The Education of Henry Adams
books.author: Henry Adams
books.summary: A prominent and caustic historian reflects on the reasons that “the more he was educated, the less he understood,” and what he believes the future holds for American society.

books.title: Monsieur Lecoq
books.author: Émile Gaboriau
books.summary: Monsieur Lecoq’s first case in which he tries to determine the identity of a man in custody for three murders.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: Dialogues
books.author: Seneca
books.summary: Seneca’s dialogues and consolations, including “On Benefits,” examine living life through the lens of Stoic philosophy.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Mina Loy
books.summary: A collection of poems by Mina Loy.

books.title: Main Street
books.author: Sinclair Lewis
books.summary: An ambitious young woman chafes against the constraints of small-town America.

books.title: In the Days of the Comet
books.author: H. G. Wells
books.summary: A strange comet collides with Earth, spreading vapors that change human consciousness in a variety of positive ways.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Ray Bradbury
books.summary: A collection of science fiction and fantasy stories by Ray Bradbury ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The City of God
books.author: Augustine of Hippo
books.summary: Bishop Augustine of Hippo provides a defense of the Christian faith against its pagan critics, as well as explaining God’s work and purposes in world history, from beginning to end.

books.title: Travel Essays
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A collection of Robert Louis Stevenson’s travel essays.
